methods.name: 批判的思考
methods.finding: success reports existed while task state was empty

methods.name: 演繹思考
methods.finding: kind-specific canonical lint was not part of success evidence

methods.name: 帰納的思考
methods.finding: system skills diverged from established dev-graph conventions

methods.name: アブダクション
methods.finding: visual presence checks were the most likely source of false success

methods.name: 垂直思考
methods.finding: run/assign names did not carry their invocation and fork semantics

methods.name: 要素分解
methods.finding: all seven agent artifacts failed canonical layer checks

methods.name: MECE
methods.finding: artifact, semantic lint, dependency, state, and evidence gates were incomplete as a set

methods.name: 2軸思考
methods.finding: canonical composition repair was low-cost and high-fidelity

methods.name: プロセス思考
methods.finding: state write-back and outer-loop completion steps were absent

methods.name: メタ思考
methods.finding: route completion and graph completion needed separate authorities

methods.name: 抽象化思考
methods.finding: cross-plugin planning required a versioned executable contract

methods.name: ダブル・ループ思考
methods.finding: feature identity improvements had not reached command inputs

methods.name: ブレインストーミング
methods.finding: six handoff alternatives converged on feature-id plus bounded feature-context

methods.name: 水平思考
methods.finding: existing repository skill conventions exposed missing frontmatter

methods.name: 逆説思考
methods.finding: removing weak reports did not reduce runtime assurance because tests were absent

methods.name: 類推思考
methods.finding: hook wiring used two competing SSOT patterns

methods.name: if思考
methods.finding: tenfold feature concurrency lacked durable lease and idempotency semantics

methods.name: 素人思考
methods.finding: the macro-to-exact-13 entry sequence lacked user documentation

methods.name: システム思考
methods.finding: exact-13 registration had no deterministic consumer

methods.name: 因果関係分析
methods.finding: partial schema checks could admit incomplete plans into promotion

methods.name: 因果ループ
methods.finding: empty state and missing summary left the improvement loop open

methods.name: トレードオン思考
methods.finding: promotion needed staged metadata plus one generation rename

methods.name: プラスサム思考
methods.finding: portable schema references benefit both producer and consumer

methods.name: 価値提案思考
methods.finding: manual planning could not identify one feature deterministically

methods.name: 戦略的思考
methods.finding: substring GitHub host parsing was unsafe under future remote variation

methods.name: why思考
methods.finding: report shape validation did not replay semantic evidence

methods.name: 改善思考
methods.finding: Phase 11 required negative fixtures instead of syntax-only evidence

methods.name: 仮説思考
methods.finding: route completeness did not imply task-graph completeness

methods.name: 論点思考
methods.finding: build-summary and completion gate must be final authority

methods.name: KJ法
methods.finding: findings grouped into execution-state, contract, atomicity, and evidence islands

remediation: rewrote seven agents to the canonical seven-layer contract
normalized system skill invocation and fork frontmatter
added feature-id and bounded feature-context inputs plus READMEs
normalized both capability bundles and hook SSOT wiring
added exact-13 atomic registration and cross-plugin preflight
completed schema parity, exact GitHub host parsing, and recoverable atomic promotion
aligned validators with script capabilities and external hook config references
added 50 runtime negative, recovery, and coverage tests plus 48 validator tests
measured branch-inclusive coverage for every script and hook and fixed the C25 bd-bridge invocation found by the coverage run
